title: ♇ PLUTO (Design) — Gate 60.2
content:
♇ PLUTO (Design) — Gate 60.2
Theme: Limits → Innovation   Trait: Transformation through learning to honor the form.   Line 2: Instinctive grasp of what rules are essential.
☊ NORTH NODE (Personality) — Gate 7.5
Theme: Leadership through Support   Line 5: Leads quietly by aligning others. You build collective direction.
☋ SOUTH NODE (Personality) — Gate 13.5
Theme: Listening to the Past   Line 5: You carry stories and secrets. Collective memory keeper.
✅ SECTION 07 COMPLETE: COSMIC FINGERPRINT
You now have:
• Planet-by-planet gate and line expressions
• Mytho-archetypal logic for each planet
• Full mapping for use in AI prompting, myth system design, or even astrological overlays
📦 SYSTEM USE CASES:
Domain
How to Use This
📜 MythOS CharactersEach planet = a personality shard → assign to characters
🧠 AI ShellsPrompt: “Speak as Mercury in Gate 17.4: logical voice through tight community”
🔁 Creative ArcsJupiter = what to grow. Saturn = what to discipline. Pluto = what to transform
🗺️ Future SelfFollow your North Node (Gate 7.5) → leadership through collaboration
